commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d16e28df44da08549fca58ecbd74c000f972a409)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds shared MiniMax and Alibaba Coding Plan endpoint override validation, fail-closed fetcher errors, diagnostic categorization, focused tests, and provider docs for provider-owned HTTPS-only overrides.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main accepts arbitrary MiniMax and Alibaba endpoint override values and the PR proof shows those values are rejected before network use after the patch. I did not run live provider probes because the repository policy avoids credential/keychain validation unless explicitly requested.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer approval, not a mechanical repair, is the blocker because the PR intentionally changes credentialed endpoint override policy.

target.title: [security] fix(providers): validate sibling endpoint overrides
target.body:
## Summary
- Add a shared provider endpoint override validator for sibling usage providers.
- Restrict MiniMax and Alibaba endpoint overrides to their expected provider domains.
- Reject non-HTTPS schemes, embedded userinfo, and percent-encoded host delimiters before credentials are attached to follow-up requests.
- Fail closed when an explicit endpoint override is rejected, instead of silently falling back to the default credentialed provider endpoint.
- Add focused regression coverage for rejected attacker hosts, encoded-delimiter bypasses, rejected `http://` overrides, rejected `user:pass@` URLs, accepted provider-owned HTTPS/bare host overrides, and fail-closed fetcher behavior.
- Update MiniMax and Alibaba provider docs to make the provider-owned HTTPS-only override contract explicit.

## Compatibility note
This intentionally treats explicit `http://...` endpoint overrides as invalid, even for otherwise provider-owned hosts. These settings carry cookies or API credentials into provider requests, so preserving insecure HTTP compatibility would keep a credential-disclosure footgun. Bare host overrides such as `platform.minimaxi.com` and provider HTTPS URLs remain supported; callers that need a custom endpoint should use HTTPS on a provider-owned hostname.

Arbitrary proxy/test domains are intentionally no longer supported for these credentialed provider paths. Maintainer sign-off is requested on that provider-owned-only endpoint policy because it is a compatibility break from previous arbitrary override behavior.

## Validation
- `swift run EndpointProof` from a temporary local package depending on this checkout's `CodexBarCore` — passed. The proof exercised the real CodexBar settings/env reader and fetcher paths with redacted credentials/cookies:

```text
PASS MiniMax accepted provider HTTPS overrides: hosts=platform.minimaxi.com,platform.minimax.io
PASS Alibaba accepted provider HTTPS override: host=pre-cn-hangzhou.alibabacloud.com
PASS MiniMax rejected attacker override before network: MINIMAX_CODING_PLAN_URL
PASS MiniMax rejected http override before network: MINIMAX_CODING_PLAN_URL
PASS MiniMax rejected userinfo override before network: MINIMAX_CODING_PLAN_URL
PASS MiniMax rejected encoded-host override before network: MINIMAX_CODING_PLAN_URL
PASS Alibaba API rejected attacker override before network: ALIBABA_CODING_PLAN_QUOTA_URL
PASS Alibaba API rejected http override before network: ALIBABA_CODING_PLAN_QUOTA_URL
PASS Alibaba API rejected userinfo override before network: ALIBABA_CODING_PLAN_QUOTA_URL
PASS Alibaba API rejected encoded-host override before network: ALIBABA_CODING_PLAN_QUOTA_URL
Endpoint override real env/settings-path proof passed
```


- `swift run DiagnosticSmoke` from a temporary local package depending on this checkout's `CodexBarCore` — passed. The proof exercises `ProviderDiagnosticError.errorCategory(_:)` for `AlibabaCodingPlanUsageError.invalidEndpointOverride("ALIBABA_CODING_PLAN_QUOTA_URL")` and verifies the invalid endpoint override remains a configuration issue instead of being text-classified as API/network:

```text
category=configuration
safeDescription=Configuration issue - check provider source and settings
PASS Alibaba invalid endpoint override diagnostic is configuration
```

- `swift build --target CodexBarCore` — passed.
- `git diff --check` — passed.
- `make check` — SwiftFormat lint mode passed (`0/998 files require formatting`); SwiftLint was blocked by the existing local SourceKit issue (`Loading sourcekitdInProc.framework/Versions/A/sourcekitdInProc failed`).
- `swift test --filter 'MiniMaxEndpointOverrideSettingsTests|AlibabaCodingPlanRegionTests'` — blocked before the focused tests by the existing local `KeyboardShortcuts`/SwiftUI `#Preview` macro toolchain issue (`PreviewsMacros` plugin not found).
target.author: hinotoi-agent

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: Hinotoi-agent
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
